title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Blue Dart Digital Technologies family as a Marketplace Manager in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!
